title: astragalus squarrosus
intro: Astragalus squarrosus, also known as milk vetch, is a perennial herb in the legume family native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, and is traditionally used in herbal medicine to boost the immune system and promote overall well-being. The health benefits of Astragalus squarrosus are believed to include reduced stress and fatigue, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced resistance to illness and infection. Astragalus squarrosus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
